settings.title: My order arrived damaged
settings.text: If, despite our best efforts to carefully prepare your order, it arrives damaged and you would like to return the item, please accept oursincere apologies. To assist you with this matter, please contact our Customer Service team and send a minimum of three photos of the product you received.

settings.title: STILL NEED ASSISTANCE?
settings.text: Leave your message below and we'll get back to you shortly.
